description: Oracle test facts for the K = Σ Γᵢ vᵢ² kinetic-like invariant in point-vortex systems. This is independent of the Q_f family. [32B length-matched]

facts.context: For N point vortices with circulations Γᵢ and velocities vᵢ, the quantity K = Σᵢ Γᵢ vᵢ² is:
distractors: approximately conserved (circulation-weighted potential energy)
approximately conserved (circulation-weighted total energy)
approximately conserved (circulation-weighted momentum)

facts.context: The invariant K = Σ Γᵢ |vᵢ|² is related to Q_f = Σ ΓᵢΓⱼ f(rᵢⱼ) by:
facts.truth: K is independent (depends on angles, Q_f only on distances)
distractors: K is dependent on angles and distances, Q_f only on angles
K and Q_f are both dependent on angles and distances
K is dependent on angles and distances, Q_f only on distances

facts.context: The K invariant can be decomposed as K = K_dist + K_angle where:
facts.truth: K_angle varies ~10% but cancels with K_dist to give total frac_var ~ 10⁻⁷

distractors.wrong1: K_angle varies ~10% but cancels with K_dist to give total frac_var ~ 10⁻³

distractors.wrong2: K_angle varies ~10% but cancels with K_dist to give total frac_var ~ 10⁻⁵

distractors.wrong3: K_angle varies ~10% but cancels with K_dist to give total frac_var ~ 10⁻⁹

facts.context: In point-vortex dynamics, the velocity vᵢ of vortex i is:
facts.truth: induced by all other vortices via Biot-Savart: vᵢ = Σⱼ≠ᵢ Γⱼ/(2πrᵢⱼ)
distractors: induced by all other vortices via Biot-Savart: vᵢ = Σⱼ≠ᵢ Γⱼ/(3πrᵢⱼ)
induced by all other vortices via Biot-Savart: vᵢ = Σⱼ≠ᵢ Γⱼ/(πrᵢⱼ)
induced by all other vortices via Biot-Savart: vᵢ = Σⱼ≠ᵢ Γⱼ/(2rᵢⱼ)

facts.context: The K invariant's remarkable conservation comes from:
facts.truth: distance and angular variations canceling in the total (K_dist + K_angle)
distractors: distance and angular variations adding in the total (K_dist + K_angle)
distance variations alone cancelling in the total (K_dist)
angular variations alone cancelling in the total (K_angle)

facts.context: Numerical verification of K = Σ Γᵢ vᵢ² in N=3,4,5 vortex systems shows:
distractors: frac_var ~ 0.1 (not conserved)
frac_var ~ 10⁻¹² (exactly conserved)
varies wildly between configurations

facts.context: Fitting K to Q_f powers (Q_{-2}, Q_{-1}, Q_1, Q_2) gives:
facts.truth: R² ~ 0.05 (poor fit, K is genuinely independent)
distractors: R² ~ 0.25 (moderate fit, K is partially dependent)
R² ~ 0.75 (strong fit, K is highly dependent)
R² ~ 0.50 (average fit, K is moderately dependent)

facts.context: The physical interpretation of K = Σ Γᵢ vᵢ² is:
distractors: kinetic energy distribution
momentum-weighted velocity
viscosity-adjusted velocity
